name: Simple Trifle.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the sponge cake into 5 cm (2 inch) squares and place them in a medium serving bowl.
2. Arrange the thawed strawberries on top of the sponge squares.
3. Peel and slice the banana, then place the slices over the strawberries.
4. Pour the orange juice over the fruit.
5. Cover the fruit with Greek yogurt.
6. Sprinkle flaked almonds over the top.
7. Place the trifle in the fridge for at least 30 minutes before serving.
